Name: Expedia Group Inc.
Description: Expedia Group, Inc. is an American online travel shopping company for consumer and small business travel. Its websites, which are primarily travel fare aggregators and travel metasearch engines, include Expedia.com, Vrbo (previously HomeAway), Hotels.com, Hotwire.com, Orbitz, Travelocity, trivago and CarRentals.com.
Address: 1111 EXPEDIA GROUP WAY WEST, SEATTLE, WA, UNITED STATES, 98119
